channel.title: Spotfire — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Spotfire (spotfire).

item.title: CVE-2026-8590 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Spotfire OAuth2 PKCE Bypass for public clients
item.description: Vulnerability in Spotfire Spotfire Enterprise (Spotfire Server modules), Spotfire Spotfire Enterprise with External Consumers (Spotfire Server modules), Spotfire Spotfire on Kubernetes (Spotfire Server modules). This issue affects Spotfire Enterprise…
